assertions.title: YAML configuration loads and validates into typed config model

steps.expected: Valid YAML loads into GristMillConfig with all fields populated
steps.observed: PASSED — config loads with correct agent, environment, telemetry values

steps.expected: Invalid YAML raises error referencing the file
steps.observed: PASSED — ValueError raised with 'bad.yaml' or 'yaml' in error message

steps.expected: Invalid values produce ValidationError with field details
steps.observed: PASSED — ValidationError raised with 'timeout' in field paths

steps.expected: FileNotFoundError for nonexistent config
Config loads from YAML string
steps.observed: PASSED — config loads from yaml_content parameter

steps.expected: Minimal config uses sensible defaults
steps.observed: PASSED — defaults applied: max_turns=5, timeout=600, cpu_limit=1.0

evidence.testOutput: 6 tests in TestYamlLoading class: all 6 PASSED

assertions.title: Environment variables override YAML config values

steps.expected: GRIST_MILL_TIMEOUT=600 overrides YAML timeout=300
GRIST_MILL_MODEL overrides YAML model
GRIST_MILL_RUNNER_TYPE overrides YAML runner_type
GRIST_MILL_DOCKER_IMAGE overrides nested env.docker_image
Without env var, YAML value is used

evidence.testOutput: 5 tests in TestEnvVarOverrides class: all 5 PASSED

assertions.title: CLI arguments take highest precedence in config resolution

steps.expected: CLI arg=900 overrides env=600 and YAML=300
CLI overrides env var which overrides YAML
CLI model override takes precedence over env and YAML
CLI only overrides specified fields; others from env/YAML
steps.observed: PASSED — model from CLI, timeout from env, provider from YAML

evidence.testOutput: 4 tests in TestCliOverrides class: all 4 PASSED
evidence.precedenceOrder: CLI args > env vars > YAML defaults confirmed

assertions.title: Config validation rejects unknown keys in strict mode

steps.expected: Unknown top-level key raises ValidationError with extra_forbidden
Unknown keys preserved in non-strict (default) mode
steps.observed: PASSED — core values load correctly with unknown key present

steps.expected: Unknown nested keys raise ValidationError

evidence.testOutput: 3 tests in TestStrictMode class: all 3 PASSED
evidence.strictModeBehavior: Rejects unknown keys with extra_forbidden; non-strict preserves them

steps.expected: Agent section error references agent-specific path
Environment section error references environment-specific path
Nested agent.timeout error reports full path
Errors from multiple sections reported simultaneously
steps.observed: PASSED — 2+ errors reported when both agent and environment are invalid

evidence.testOutput: 4 tests in TestNestedValidation class: all 4 PASSED
evidence.independentValidation: Each section validates independently and all errors are reported

assertions.title: Config supports list and map values for task and artifact definitions

steps.expected: Empty tasks list is valid
Single task loads with correct fields
steps.observed: PASSED — task-001 with id, language, prompt loaded correctly

steps.expected: Multiple tasks load correctly
Artifact maps with tool, mcp_server, and skill types load
steps.observed: PASSED — 3 artifacts of different types with correct names

steps.expected: Invalid task in list reports the problematic index
steps.observed: PASSED — field paths contain '1' (index of invalid task)

evidence.testOutput: 5 tests in TestListAndMapValues class: all 5 PASSED
evidence.listAndMapSupport: Tasks as lists (0, 1, 5 items), artifacts as maps (3 types) all work

assertions.title: Config resolution logs the source of each resolved value

steps.expected: DEBUG logs show 'yaml' source for YAML-derived values
DEBUG logs show source for env-var-overridden values
DEBUG logs show 'cli' source for CLI-overridden values
Non-overridden values logged as YAML source

evidence.testOutput: 4 tests in TestDebugLogging class: all 4 PASSED
evidence.logSources: YAML, env var, and CLI sources all logged in DEBUG mode

assertions.title: Config supports secret masking in string representation

steps.expected: API key masked in str(config)
API key masked in repr(config)
config.agent.api_key returns real value
Masking works when value from env var
steps.observed: PASSED — env-sourced secret masked in str, real value via direct access

steps.expected: Non-secret fields visible in str

evidence.testOutput: 5 tests in TestSecretMasking class: all 5 PASSED
evidence.maskingBehavior: API keys masked with *** in str/repr; direct field access returns real value

summary: Tested 8 config assertions (VAL-CFG-01 through VAL-CFG-08). All 42 tests passed in 0.22s. Every assertion is confirmed: YAML loading/validation, env var overrides, CLI precedence, strict mode, nested validation, list/map support, debug logging with source annotations, and secret masking all work as specified in the validation contract.
